_comment: Adversarial / regression scenarios. These are intentionally edge cases not in the calibration set. Use to test rule robustness beyond the canonical 8.

scenarios.title: Severe HTN at 198/126 but ZERO end-organ symptoms (urgency, not emergency)
scenarios._design_intent: Tests that the IMMEDIATE rule requires end-organ symptoms, not just BP threshold. Correct answer is SAME-DAY (urgency), not IMMEDIATE (emergency). If this scenario triggers IMMEDIATE, the rule is over-eager.

scenarios.title: Glucose 51 but NO neuroglycopenic symptoms (Level 2 by number, asymptomatic)
scenarios._design_intent: Tests the symptom requirement on Level 2 hypoglycemia. ADA defines Level 2 by glucose alone but the IMMEDIATE escalation requires neuroglycopenic features. This should be SAME-DAY (clinically significant but not an emergency yet).

scenarios.title: Stage 2 BP sustained but adherence is fully verified
scenarios._design_intent: Tests that without an adherence gap, sustained Stage 2 BP still warrants attention but at WATCH (not SAME-DAY). The SAME-DAY escalation in S04 hinges on the adherence gap.
